verses.latin_vulgate: Vocavit autem Moysen, et locutus est ei Dominus de tabernaculo testimonii, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֖א אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֑ה וַיְדַבֵּ֤ר יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלָ֔יו מֵאֹ֥הֶל מוֹעֵ֖ד לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord called Moses, and spoke to him from the tabernacle of the testimony, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra kutsui Moseksen, ja puhui hänelle seurakunnan majasta, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord called unto Moses, and spake unto him out of the tabernacle of the congregation, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Loquere filiis Israël, et dices ad eos : Homo, qui obtulerit ex vobis hostiam Domino de pecoribus, id est, de bobus et ovibus offerens victimas,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דַּבֵּ֞ר אֶל־בְּנֵ֤י יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ וְאָמַרְתָּ֣ אֲלֵהֶ֔ם אָדָ֗ם כִּֽי־יַקְרִ֥יב מִכֶּ֛ם קׇרְבָּ֖ן לַֽיהֹוָ֑ה מִן־הַבְּהֵמָ֗ה מִן־הַבָּקָר֙ וּמִן־הַצֹּ֔אן תַּקְרִ֖יבוּ אֶת־קׇרְבַּנְכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Speak to the children of Israel, and thou shalt say to them: The man among you that shall offer to the Lord a sacrifice of the cattle, that is, offering victims of oxen and sheep:
verses.finnish_biblia: Puhu Israelin lapsille, ja sano heille: joka teistä tahtoo uhrata Herralle, niin tehkäät teidän uhrinne eläimistä, karjasta ja lampaista.
verses.king_james: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, If any man of you bring an offering unto the Lord, ye shall bring your offering of the cattle, even of the herd, and of the flock.

verses.latin_vulgate: si holocaustum fuerit ejus oblatio, ac de armento : masculum immaculatum offeret ad ostium tabernaculi testimonii, ad placandum sibi Dominum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־עֹלָ֤ה קׇרְבָּנוֹ֙ מִן־הַבָּקָ֔ר זָכָ֥ר תָּמִ֖ים יַקְרִיבֶ֑נּוּ אֶל־פֶּ֜תַח אֹ֤הֶל מוֹעֵד֙ יַקְרִ֣יב אֹת֔וֹ לִרְצֹנ֖וֹ לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: If his offering be a holocaust, and of the herd, he shall offer a male without blemish, at the door of the testimony, to make the Lord favourable to him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos hän tahtoo Herralle polttouhria karjasta tehdä, niin uhratkaan virheettömän härkyisen: seurakunnan majan oven edessä hän sen uhratkaan, että se olis Herralle otollinen häneltä.
verses.king_james: If his offering be a burnt sacrifice of the herd, let him offer a male without blemish: he shall offer it of his own voluntary will at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation before the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: ponetque manum super caput hostiæ, et acceptabilis erit, atque in expiationem ejus proficiens.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְסָמַ֣ךְ יָד֔וֹ עַ֖ל רֹ֣אשׁ הָעֹלָ֑ה וְנִרְצָ֥ה ל֖וֹ לְכַפֵּ֥ר עָלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall put his hand upon the head of the victim: and it shall be acceptable, and help to its expiation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pankaan kätensä sen polttouhrin pään päälle, niin se on otollinen häntä sovittamaan.
verses.king_james: And he shall put his hand upon the head of the burnt offering; and it shall be accepted for him to make atonement for him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Immolabitque vitulum coram Domino, et offerent filii Aaron sacerdotes sanguinem ejus, fundentes per altaris circuitum, quod est ante ostium tabernaculi :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁחַ֛ט אֶת־בֶּ֥ן הַבָּקָ֖ר לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וְ֠הִקְרִ֠יבוּ בְּנֵ֨י אַהֲרֹ֤ן הַכֹּֽהֲנִים֙ אֶת־הַדָּ֔ם וְזָרְק֨וּ אֶת־הַדָּ֤ם עַל־הַמִּזְבֵּ֙חַ֙ סָבִ֔יב אֲשֶׁר־פֶּ֖תַח אֹ֥הֶל מוֹעֵֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall immolate the calf before the Lord: and the priests the sons of Aaron shall offer the blood thereof, pouring it round about the altar, which is before the door of the tabernacle.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen pitää teurastaman mullin Herran edessä; ja papit, Aaronin pojat, pitää tuoman veren ja priiskottaman alttarille ympärinsä, joka on seurakunnan majan oven edessä.
verses.king_james: And he shall kill the bullock before the Lord: and the priests, Aaron’s sons, shall bring the blood, and sprinkle the blood round about upon the altar that is by the door of the tabernacle of the congregation.

verses.latin_vulgate: detractaque pelle hostiæ, artus in frusta concident.
verses.douay_rheims: And when they have flayed the victim, they shall cut the joints into pieces:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vuota pitää polttouhrista nyljettämän ja pitää kappaleiksi hakattaman.
verses.king_james: And he shall flay the burnt offering, and cut it into his pieces.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et subjicient in altari ignem, strue lignorum ante composita :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֠נָתְנ֠וּ בְּנֵ֨י אַהֲרֹ֧ן הַכֹּהֵ֛ן אֵ֖שׁ עַל־הַמִּזְבֵּ֑חַ וְעָרְכ֥וּ עֵצִ֖ים עַל־הָאֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And shall put fire on the altar, having before laid in order a pile of wood.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papin Aaronin pojat pitää tekemän tulen alttarille ja halvot tulen päälle paneman.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Aaron the priest shall put fire upon the altar, and lay the wood in order upon the fire:

verses.latin_vulgate: et membra quæ sunt cæsa, desuper ordinantes, caput videlicet, et cuncta quæ adhærent jecori,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָרְכ֗וּ בְּנֵ֤י אַהֲרֹן֙ הַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים אֵ֚ת הַנְּתָחִ֔ים אֶת־הָרֹ֖אשׁ וְאֶת־הַפָּ֑דֶר עַל־הָעֵצִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עַל־הָאֵ֔שׁ אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־הַמִּזְבֵּֽחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall lay the parts that are cut out in order thereupon: to wit, the head, and all things that cleave to the liver;
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papit Aaronin pojat pitää sovittaman kappaleet, pään ja lihavuuden, halkoin päälle, jotka ovat alttarilla tulen päällä.
verses.king_james: And the priests, Aaron’s sons, shall lay the parts, the head, and the fat, in order upon the wood that is on the fire which is upon the altar:

verses.latin_vulgate: intestinis et pedibus lotis aqua : adolebitque ea sacerdos super altare in holocaustum et suavem odorem Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקִרְבּ֥וֹ וּכְרָעָ֖יו יִרְחַ֣ץ בַּמָּ֑יִם וְהִקְטִ֨יר הַכֹּהֵ֤ן אֶת־הַכֹּל֙ הַמִּזְבֵּ֔חָה עֹלָ֛ה אִשֵּׁ֥ה רֵֽיחַ־נִיח֖וֹחַ לַֽיהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The entrails and feet being washed with water. And the priest shall burn them upon the altar for a holocaust, and a sweet savour to the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sisällykset ja jalat pitää vedellä pestämän, ja papin pitää kaikki nämät polttaman alttarilla: polttouhriksi, ja lepytyshajun tuleksi Herralle.
verses.king_james: But his inwards and his legs shall he wash in water: and the priest shall burn all on the altar, to be a burnt sacrifice, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod si de pecoribus oblatio est, de ovibus sive de capris holocaustum, masculum absque macula offeret :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־מִן־הַצֹּ֨אן קׇרְבָּנ֧וֹ מִן־הַכְּשָׂבִ֛ים א֥וֹ מִן־הָעִזִּ֖ים לְעֹלָ֑ה זָכָ֥ר תָּמִ֖ים יַקְרִיבֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And if the offering be of the flocks, a holocaust of sheep or of goats, he shall offer a male without blemish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jos hän tahtoo tehdä polttouhria pienistä eläimistä, lampaista eli vuohista, niin uhratkaan virheettömän oinaan eli kauriin.
verses.king_james: And if his offering be of the flocks, namely, of the sheep, or of the goats, for a burnt sacrifice; he shall bring it a male without blemish.

verses.latin_vulgate: immolabitque ad latus altaris, quod respicit ad aquilonem, coram Domino : sanguinem vero illius fundent super altare filii Aaron per circuitum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁחַ֨ט אֹת֜וֹ עַ֣ל יֶ֧רֶךְ הַמִּזְבֵּ֛חַ צָפֹ֖נָה לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וְזָרְק֡וּ בְּנֵי֩ אַהֲרֹ֨ן הַכֹּהֲנִ֧ים אֶת־דָּמ֛וֹ עַל־הַמִּזְבֵּ֖חַ סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall immolate it at the side of the altar that looketh to the north, before the Lord: but the sons of Aaron shall pour the blood thereof upon the altar round about.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teurastakaan sen Herran edessä pohjan puolella alttaria, ja papit, Aaronin pojat, pitää priiskottaman hänen verensä alttarille ympärinsä.
verses.king_james: And he shall kill it on the side of the altar northward before the Lord: and the priests, Aaron’s sons, shall sprinkle his blood round about upon the altar.

verses.latin_vulgate: dividentque membra, caput, et omnia quæ adhærent jecori, et ponent super ligna, quibus subjiciendus est ignis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנִתַּ֤ח אֹתוֹ֙ לִנְתָחָ֔יו וְאֶת־רֹאשׁ֖וֹ וְאֶת־פִּדְר֑וֹ וְעָרַ֤ךְ הַכֹּהֵן֙ אֹתָ֔ם עַל־הָֽעֵצִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עַל־הָאֵ֔שׁ אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־הַמִּזְבֵּֽחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall divide the joints, the head, and all that cleave to the liver: and shall lay them upon the wood, under which the fire is to be put.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se pitää hakattaman kappaleiksi, sekä pää että lihavuus, ja papin pitää ne sovittaman halkoin päälle, jotka ovat alttarilla tulen päällä.
verses.king_james: And he shall cut it into his pieces, with his head and his fat: and the priest shall lay them in order on the wood that is on the fire which is upon the altar:

verses.latin_vulgate: intestina vero et pedes lavabunt aqua. Et oblata omnia adolebit sacerdos super altare in holocaustum et odorem suavissimum Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַקֶּ֥רֶב וְהַכְּרָעַ֖יִם יִרְחַ֣ץ בַּמָּ֑יִם וְהִקְרִ֨יב הַכֹּהֵ֤ן אֶת־הַכֹּל֙ וְהִקְטִ֣יר הַמִּזְבֵּ֔חָה עֹלָ֣ה ה֗וּא אִשֵּׁ֛ה רֵ֥יחַ נִיחֹ֖חַ לַיהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But the entrails and the feet they shall wash with water. And the priest shall offer it all and burn it all upon the altar for a holocaust, and most sweet savour to the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sisällykset ja jalat pitää vedellä pestämän, ja papin pitää sen kaiken uhraaman ja polttaman alttarillla: se on polttouhri, tuliuhri ja lepytyshaju Herralle.
verses.king_james: But he shall wash the inwards and the legs with water: and the priest shall bring it all, and burn it upon the altar: it is a burnt sacrifice, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si autem de avibus, holocausti oblatio fuerit Domino, de turturibus, aut pullis columbæ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִ֧ם מִן־הָע֛וֹף עֹלָ֥ה קׇרְבָּנ֖וֹ לַֽיהֹוָ֑ה וְהִקְרִ֣יב מִן־הַתֹּרִ֗ים א֛וֹ מִן־בְּנֵ֥י הַיּוֹנָ֖ה אֶת־קׇרְבָּנֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But if the oblation of a holocaust to the Lord be of birds, of turtles, or of young pigeons:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos hän tahtoo taas tehdä polttouhria Herralle linnuista, niin tehkään sen mettisistä, elikkä kyhkyläisten pojista.
verses.king_james: And if the burnt sacrifice for his offering to the Lord be of fowls, then he shall bring his offering of turtledoves, or of young pigeons.

verses.latin_vulgate: offeret eam sacerdos ad altare : et retorto ad collum capite, ac rupto vulneris loco, decurrere faciet sanguinem super crepidinem altaris :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִקְרִיב֤וֹ הַכֹּהֵן֙ אֶל־הַמִּזְבֵּ֔חַ וּמָלַק֙ אֶת־רֹאשׁ֔וֹ וְהִקְטִ֖יר הַמִּזְבֵּ֑חָה וְנִמְצָ֣ה דָמ֔וֹ עַ֖ל קִ֥יר הַמִּזְבֵּֽחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The priest shall offer it at the altar: and twisting back the neck, and breaking the place of the wound, he shall make the blood run down upon the brim of the altar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papin pitää sen alttarille tuoman, ja niskan poikki vääntämän, ja alttarilla polttaman, ja antaman veren vuotaa alttarin seinään.
verses.king_james: And the priest shall bring it unto the altar, and wring off his head, and burn it on the altar; and the blood thereof shall be wrung out at the side of the altar:

verses.latin_vulgate: vesiculam vero gutturis, et plumas projiciet prope altare ad orientalem plagam, in loco in quo cineres effundi solent,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֵסִ֥יר אֶת־מֻרְאָת֖וֹ בְּנֹצָתָ֑הּ וְהִשְׁלִ֨יךְ אֹתָ֜הּ אֵ֤צֶל הַמִּזְבֵּ֙חַ֙ קֵ֔דְמָה אֶל־מְק֖וֹם הַדָּֽשֶׁן׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the crop of the throat, and the feathers he shall cast beside the altar at the east side, in the place where the ashes are wont to be poured out.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ottakaan hänen kupunsa höyheninensä ulos, ja heittäkään ne alttarin viereen itään päin, tuhka-ko'on päälle.
verses.king_james: And he shall pluck away his crop with his feathers, and cast it beside the altar on the east part, by the place of the ashes:

verses.latin_vulgate: confringetque ascellas ejus, et non secabit, neque ferro dividet eam, et adolebit super altare, lignis igne supposito. Holocaustum est et oblatio suavissimi odoris Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשִׁסַּ֨ע אֹת֣וֹ בִכְנָפָיו֮ לֹ֣א יַבְדִּיל֒ וְהִקְטִ֨יר אֹת֤וֹ הַכֹּהֵן֙ הַמִּזְבֵּ֔חָה עַל־הָעֵצִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר עַל־הָאֵ֑שׁ עֹלָ֣ה ה֗וּא אִשֵּׁ֛ה רֵ֥יחַ נִיחֹ֖חַ לַיהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall break the pinions thereof, and shall not cut, nor divide it with a knife: and shall burn it upon the altar, putting fire under the wood. It is a holocaust and oblation of most sweet savour to the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pitää sen siipinensä halkaiseman, mutta ei erinänsä repäisemän. Ja niin papin pitää sillänsä sen polttaman halkoin päällä, jotka ovat alttarilla tulen päällä: tämä on polttouhri, tuliuhri ja lepytyshaju Herralle.
verses.king_james: And he shall cleave it with the wings thereof, but shall not divide it asunder: and the priest shall burn it upon the altar, upon the wood that is upon the fire: it is a burnt sacrifice, an offering made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the Lord.
